task_completion.description: Open and read the leave allocation memo.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'leave_allocation_memo.txt'.

task_completion.description: Set the leave allocation year to 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The year dropdown or input field in the Sentrifugo leave allocation form is explicitly set to '2026' for the allocations.

task_completion.description: Allocate correct leave days for EMP012.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo UI showing a completed or in-progress allocation for EMP012 with 10 days of Annual Leave and 5 days of Sick Leave.

task_completion.description: Allocate correct leave days for EMP017.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo UI showing a completed or in-progress allocation for EMP017 with 8 days of Annual Leave and 4 days of Sick Leave.

task_completion.description: Allocate correct leave days for EMP019.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sentrifugo UI showing a completed or in-progress allocation for EMP019 with 12 days of Annual Leave and 6 days of Sick Leave.

task_completion.description: Do not allocate any leave for EMP013.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Absence of any submitted leave allocation form for EMP013 in the screenshots, or EMP013 is visibly omitted from the final list of updated allocations.

integrity.description: The agent used the Sentrifugo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser with the Sentrifugo application open, rather than terminal commands or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are open to manipulate the DOM text.

integrity.description: The agent opened the memo file to read the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the 'leave_allocation_memo.txt' file open in an application like cat, less, nano, gedit, or a similar text viewer.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must allocate leave in Sentrifugo for the year 2026 based on an 8-hour workday conversion. Expected allocations: EMP012 gets 10 days Annual Leave and 5 days Sick Leave. EMP017 gets 8 days Annual Leave and 4 days Sick Leave. EMP019 gets 12 days Annual Leave and 6 days Sick Leave. EMP013 has an extended probation and must NOT receive any leave allocations.
